action_set_definitions.name: get_ticket_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full details of a specific ticket, including its current status, tier, and history.

ticket_id.description: The unique identifier of the ticket (e.g., 'TICK-902').

action_set_definitions.name: analyze_diagnostic_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Processes ticket logs to determine the specific technical root cause and the technical domain (e.g., Database, Network, Auth).

ticket_id.description: The identifier for the ticket whose logs need analysis.

action_set_definitions.name: check_sla_timer
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the elapsed time spent on the current troubleshooting session for a ticket.

ticket_id.description: The ticket ID to check the timer for.

action_set_definitions.name: list_tier_specialists
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of available staff for a specific tier, including their domain expertise and current workload.

action_set_definitions.name: get_mve_checklist
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the Minimum Viable Escalation (MVE) requirements for a specific technical domain.

domain.description: The technical domain identified from the root cause analysis.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_privacy_scrub
action_set_definitions.description: Removes PII and sensitive data from logs or transaction payloads to comply with privacy protocols.

content.description: The raw log or payload content to be scrubbed.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_escalation
action_set_definitions.description: Formally escalates a ticket to the next tier and assigns it to a specific specialist.

target_tier.description: The tier level to escalate to (e.g., 2 or 3).

assigned_specialist.description: The name of the specialist to receive the ticket.

escalation_summary.description: The detailed, scrubbed summary meeting MVE requirements.

state_description.tickets: A list of objects representing active and historical tickets in the system.
state_description.personnel: A mapping of support tiers to available staff and their current workload.
state_description.system_config: Global settings such as max_escalation_tier and SLA_thresholds.
